Operation 'getAllPeople' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing description is a critical gap. Added details about pagination support, request parameters, response structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Retrieve a list of all people
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all people records in the system. Accepts filtering and pagination parameters via GetAllPeopleRequest (supports parameters like page, limit, and optional filters). Returns a PeopleListResponse containing an array of Person objects with their core information. No side effects. Useful for bulk data retrieval and system-wide people management.
data.reasoning: Missing description is a critical gap. Added details about pagination support, request parameters, response structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getPersonInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing description limits AI agent understanding. Added specifics about required input (person ID), response structure, and the comprehensive nature of returned data to help agents determine when to use this operation versus getAllPeople.

data.current_summary: Find a person by their ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific person by their ID. Requires a person ID in the GetPersonInfoRequest. Returns a PersonDetailResponse containing the complete Person object with all available fields (26 properties including contact info, demographics, and custom fields). No side effects. Use this when you need comprehensive details about a specific individual.
data.reasoning: Missing description limits AI agent understanding. Added specifics about required input (person ID), response structure, and the comprehensive nature of returned data to help agents determine when to use this operation versus getAllPeople.

message: Operation 'searchPeople' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing description prevents AI agents from understanding search capabilities and parameters. Added context about search parameters, response format, and differentiation from getAllPeople to improve agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Searches for people records matching specified criteria. Accepts search parameters via SearchPeopleRequest (supports query terms and filter options). Returns a PeopleListResponse with matching Person objects. No side effects. Use this operation when you need to find specific people based on search terms or filters rather than retrieving all records.
data.reasoning: Missing description prevents AI agents from understanding search capabilities and parameters. Added context about search parameters, response format, and differentiation from getAllPeople to improve agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createPerson' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing description is critical for mutation operations. Added details about input structure, response format, side effects (record creation), and the importance of understanding required fields for AI agents to safely use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new person record in the system. Accepts person data via CreatePersonRequest (16 fields including name, contact information, and optional custom fields). Returns a PersonMutationResponse containing the newly created Person object with assigned ID. Side effect: Creates a permanent record in the system. Required fields and validation rules should be verified before submission.
data.reasoning: Missing description is critical for mutation operations. Added details about input structure, response format, side effects (record creation), and the importance of understanding required fields for AI agents to safely use this operation.

message: Operation 'editPerson' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing description for a critical mutation operation. Added specifics about required person ID, partial update support, response format, and side effects to enable AI agents to safely and correctly use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing person record with new information. Accepts person ID and updated fields via EditPersonRequest (17 fields including name, contact info, and custom fields). Returns a PersonMutationResponse containing the updated Person object. Side effect: Modifies the person record permanently; supports partial updates where only provided fields are changed. Verify person ID exists before attempting edit.
data.reasoning: Missing description for a critical mutation operation. Added specifics about required person ID, partial update support, response format, and side effects to enable AI agents to safely and correctly use this operation.
